mapper.update: update biz_finance_budget set budget_year = #{budgetYear}, department_id = #{departmentId}, instrument_id = #{instrumentId}, budget_amount = #{budgetAmount}, warning_ratio = #{warningRatio}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, operator_user_id = #{operatorUserId}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select b.*, d.dept_name as department_name, i.instrument_name, u.real_name as operator_user_name from biz_finance_budget b left join sys_department d on d.id = b.department_id left join biz_instrument i on i.id = b.instrument_id left join sys_user u on u.id = b.operator_user_id where b.id = #{id} limit 1

select * from biz_finance_budget where budget_year = #{budgetYear} and ((department_id is null and #{departmentId} is null) or department_id = #{departmentId}) and ((instrument_id is null and #{instrumentId} is null) or instrument_id = #{instrumentId}) limit 1
